f.name: CalcMoWITTWindward

deps.name: CalcMoWITTNatural
deps.cpp_impl: double CalcMoWITTNatural_impl(double DeltaTemp){ double temp_fac=0.84; return temp_fac*std::pow(std::abs(DeltaTemp),1.0/3.0); }

deps.name: CalcMoWITTForcedWindward
deps.cpp_impl: double CalcMoWITTForcedWindward_impl(double WindAtZ){ double wind_fac=3.26, wind_exp=0.89; return wind_fac*std::pow(WindAtZ,wind_exp); }

f.name: CalcMoWITTLeeward

deps.name: CalcMoWITTNatural
deps.cpp_impl: double CalcMoWITTNatural_impl(double DeltaTemp){ double temp_fac=0.84; return temp_fac*std::pow(std::abs(DeltaTemp),1.0/3.0); }

deps.name: CalcMoWITTForcedLeeward
deps.cpp_impl: double CalcMoWITTForcedLeeward_impl(double WindAtZ){ double wind_fac=3.55, wind_exp=0.617; return wind_fac*std::pow(WindAtZ,wind_exp); }
